name: OpenAI Model Spec
description: OpenAI's Model Spec — defines how OpenAI models should behave across different situations. Specifies objectives, rules, and default behaviors at multiple levels (platform, developer, user). First published 2024-05-08.
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI-safety / model-behavior governance document. Sets the policy layer above the model.

license.notes: Vendor-published framework. Verify specific license terms at the source URL before redistribution.

current_extraction.notes: Captured via playwright headless browser. Full canonical OpenAI Model Spec (2025-12-18 version, 7700+ lines): chain of command, behavioral principles, content policies, dual-newline-separated specifications. Note: Model Spec is dated/versioned; this captures the spec valid as of acquisition.
